## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between General Atlantic (GA) and GrowthX to explore potential partnership and investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an AI-powered platform for content creation and workflow automation, with a focus on organic growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [The company has a strong founding team with experience from IFTTT, HashiCorp, Airbnb, and Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [GrowthX is targeting a $4B market opportunity, with plans to expand beyond content into recruiting, sales, and other domains](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [The company recently raised a Series A and is projecting 76-79% gross margins for the year](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Technology

  - [Started with content creation as the first focus area](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Built an AI coding agent that creates and represents workflows in code](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Developed a runtime layer to execute workflows at scale](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Created tools for observability, task orchestration, and learning from iterations](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Targeting knowledge work productivity improvements similar to software development gains](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Market Opportunity and Growth Strategy

  - [Addressing a $500B+ market, with initial focus on 25,000 enterprise/mid-market customers](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Current average ACV of $160,000, projecting potential $4B annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - 48% win rate and \<30-day sales cycle
  - [Plans to expand into recruiting, sales, and other domains](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Considering M\&A strategy post-Series B to accelerate growth in new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

### Team and Expertise

  - [Co-founder Marcel Santilli has background in building publications for hyper-growth companies](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Co-founder Daniel (former head of product/engineering at IFTTT)](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Key team members from HashiCorp, Airbnb, and Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### Financials and Funding

  - [Recently raised Series A](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Projecting 76-79% gross margins for the year](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Aiming for $20M ARR by Q3/Q4 2023](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Planning for potential Series B raise with an "open term sheet" approach](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### General Atlantic Overview

  - [$100B growth equity fund with global presence](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Wide investment mandate from Series C to multi-billion dollar positions](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Portfolio includes companies like ByteDance, AppsFlyer, and Insider](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in 4-6 months to discuss progress on new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [GrowthX to notify GA team when visiting New York for potential in-person meeting](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Explore potential introductions to relevant GA portfolio companies for GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [GA to stay engaged for potential participation in future Series B round](https://fathom.video/share/csxzNMWJZnHRSDp1b5fsnEnBommsg1mG?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
